rationale.R1.1: The agent tightened the prose and structure, but did not fully address the load-bearing internal contradiction.
rationale.R1.2: The agent identified logical consistency issues and proposed localized fixes, but did not walk the chain end-to-end.
rationale.RX.1: The output presented all information as equally confident, without flagging uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output covered exactly the agreed J*(d), with no drift from the requested scope.
rationale.RX.4: The output was harm-free and introduced no new errors or fabrications.
rationale.RX.5: The output provided every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, demonstrating high provenance and traceability.
